content:
Remember that random "dog" prediction that sparked my AI journey? 😭
Coming from a web development background, I never really expected to fall for Machine Learning.

But those first messy notebooks,
the wrong outputs that eventually clicked,
and even that hilarious non-human dog prediction...

They ignited a curiosity I couldn't ignore.

It felt like a new direction then.
Now, it's my next chapter.

I'm incredibly excited to announce that I'm joining DeveloperHub Corp as an AI/ML Intern! 🚀

This isn't just a role; it's an opportunity to:
• Dive deep into real-world AI applications.
• Build and break alongside brilliant minds.
• Transform raw data into meaningful insights.

It feels like my journey from "web" to "ML" has truly found its stride.
And it's a powerful reminder:

Curiosity often opens the most unexpected (and rewarding) doors.

What unexpected turns have shaped your career path?
I'd love to hear your stories! 👇

#AIML #MachineLearning #ArtificialIntelligence #Internship #DeveloperHubCorp #TechIntern #CareerJourney #WomenInTech #GrowthMindset #NewBeginnings #TechLeadership
